name: connectwise-control-mcp
description: Manage ConnectWise Control (ScreenConnect) remote support and access sessions from the terminal or your AI agent: list and inspect sessions across groups, run commands on guest machines, rename and tag sessions, manage instance users, and query the audit log - the whole instance from one CLI.

connectwise_control_base_url.title: CONNECTWISE_CONTROL_BASE_URL
connectwise_control_base_url.description: Your ConnectWise Control / ScreenConnect instance base URL, e.g. https://company.screenconnect.com (per-instance, required).

connectwise_control_username.title: CONNECTWISE_CONTROL_USERNAME
connectwise_control_username.description: Your ConnectWise Control instance user name (HTTP Basic auth).

connectwise_control_password.title: CONNECTWISE_CONTROL_PASSWORD
connectwise_control_password.description: Your ConnectWise Control instance password (HTTP Basic auth).
